purpose: Tie one recipient write-buffer command-message append transition to its claim, proof certificate, schematic trace, rendered SVG, and source-status boundaries.
boundaries: This bundle covers only single recipient write-buffer command-message append execution, not init-family command consumption.
Direct self-mailbox and completed self-target command-buffer write-buffer execution remain covered by their ADR-0162 evidence bundles.
standard-signal recipient non-init command messages and multi-command recipient conflicts remain rejection boundaries.
The full-buffer boundary remains covered by the recipient write-buffer runtime and claim tests rather than this non-full trace.
